title: Host Project Language Schema
description: Schema for machine-readable host-owned project language terms.

term_id.description: The unique identifier for the host project term.

definition.description: The exact definition of the host project term.

bounded_context.description: The logical boundary or module where this term applies.

authority_source.description: The host project document, ADR, or domain expert that defines this term.

aliases.description: Acceptable aliases or phrases referencing this term.

forbidden_meanings.description: Negative examples or contexts where this term does not apply.

ambiguity_action.description: Fallback action required immediately if meaning or intent is ambiguous.
